extension.description: Extension for PowerBuilder and PowerScript with lightweight client and separate LSP server.
command.openExplainSystemSymbol: PowerSyntax: Explain System Symbol at Cursor
command.openExplainSemanticQuery: PowerSyntax: Explain Semantic Query at Cursor
command.openCodeMetrics: PowerSyntax: Open Advanced PowerBuilder Code Metrics
command.openTechnicalDebtReport: PowerSyntax: Open PowerBuilder Technical Debt and Modernization Report
command.refreshCurrentObjectContextPanel: PowerSyntax: Refresh Current Object Context Panel
command.focusCurrentObjectContextPanel: PowerSyntax: Show Current Object Context Panel
command.openCurrentObjectContextLocation: PowerSyntax: Open Location from Current Object Context
command.openDiagnosticsExplainabilityLoc: PowerSyntax: Open Location from Diagnostics Explainability
command.focusObjectExplorerOnCurrentProj: PowerSyntax: Focus Object Explorer on Active Project
command.focusObjectExplorerOnCurrentFile: PowerSyntax: Focus Object Explorer on Active File
command.openObjectExplorerObject: PowerSyntax: Open Object from Object Explorer
command.runPbAutoBuildWithPicker: PowerSyntax: Choose PBAutoBuild Build and Run
command.exportOrcaStaging: PowerSyntax: Export Legacy PBL to ORCA Staging
command.importOrcaStaging: PowerSyntax: Import ORCA Staging to Legacy PBL
command.regenerateOrcaLibraries: PowerSyntax: Regenerate Legacy Libraries via ORCA
command.rebuildOrcaProject: PowerSyntax: Rebuild Legacy Project via ORCA
view.objectExplorer.name: PowerBuilder Object Explorer
view.currentObjectContext.name: Current Object Context
view.diagnosticsExplainability.name: Diagnostics Explainability
config.profile.description: Governed product profile. Exposes corporate presets: fast, balanced, deep-analysis, legacy-orca, ci-support, and support-safe as a defensible baseline for critical client settings.
config.progress.show.description: Show indexing progress indicator in the status bar.
config.languageServices.documentationLoc: Locale for documentation visible in hover, completion, and signatureHelp. 'auto' uses VS Code's language when compatible and falls back to English otherwise.
config.build.pbAutoBuildPath.description: Optional path to PBAutoBuild250.exe. If empty, the client will try PB_AUTOBUILD_PATH and default installation candidates.
config.legacy.orcaPath.description: Explicit path to the legacy ORCA executable. If empty, the client will try PB_ORCA_PATH without fuzzy auto-detection of installed paths.
config.legacy.orcaSessionDll.description: ORCA session DLL for export to staging. If empty, the client will try PB_ORCA_DLL and fall back to pborc250.dll as the default for PowerBuilder 2025.
config.formatting.enabled.description: Enable the conservative formatter for compatible PowerBuilder documents.
config.formatting.formatOnSave.descripti: Apply the internal formatter when saving compatible PowerBuilder documents.
config.formatting.keywordCase.descriptio: Base case for PowerBuilder keywords when no more specific option exists.
config.formatting.statementCase.descript: Case for executable keywords like IF, ELSE, RETURN, or END IF.
config.formatting.typeCase.description: Case for structural blocks like GLOBAL TYPE, FORWARD PROTOTYPES, or END TYPE.
config.formatting.eventKeywordCase.descr: Case for EVENT/ON and their closures.
config.formatting.indentStyle.descriptio: Indentation style for the conservative formatter.
config.formatting.maxDocumentChars.descr: Maximum character budget for running the formatter. Use 0 to disable this limit.
config.formatting.maxDocumentLines.descr: Maximum line budget for running the formatter. Use 0 to disable this limit.
config.formatting.trimTrailingWhitespace: Trim trailing whitespace when the formatter applies changes.
config.formatting.spaceAfterComma.descri: Normalize to a single space after each comma outside of strings and comments.
config.formatting.spaceAroundOperators.d: Normalize spaces around conservative relational and assignment operators.
config.formatting.normalizeBlankLines.de: Preserve or compact consecutive blank lines during formatting.
